First Savings Financing System Workshop was held at our University

24.10.2023

The first of the Savings Financing System workshops, which addressed an important transformation in Turkey's financial sector, was held with the participation of sector representatives.

Within the scope of the cooperation between our university and the Association of Financial Institutions (FKB) and member institutions, the first Savings Financing System Workshop was held on Friday, October 20 at Ibn Haldun University Complex under the theme of "Assessment of the Situation Related to the Sector".

"We are Happy to Host Such an Important Workshop in Terms of Finance"

Greeting the participants at the beginning of the workshop, Our Rector Prof. Atilla Arkan expressed his happiness that sector representatives and academics came together to organize such a workshop and that Ibn Haldun University hosted this workshop.

At the workshop, sector stakeholders and expert academics from our University came together and discussed the current situation, past and future of the Savings Finance system. The workshop, which addressed an important transformation in Turkey's financial sector, discussed key issues such as the future of the Savings Finance System, training qualified human resources, legislative regulations, developing communication and media relations, creating literature and developing the system.

The workshop was conducted by academics under the chairmanship of Prof. Atilla Arkan, Rector of Ibn Haldun University, and was attended by our vice-rectors and academics from various departments.

The academics listened to the sector participants, shared their opinions and suggestions about the problems faced by the sector and its future, and held discussions.

According to the results obtained from the workshop, it was understood that the financial sector continues to take important steps towards making it more effective, innovative and inclusive, and that the Savings Finance system can contribute to the development of the financial sector. Ibn Haldun University also shows that it will continue its efforts to bring together academia and sector stakeholders, attaching importance to its mission of cooperation with the real sector.

According to the results obtained from the workshop, the finance sector continues to take important steps towards making it more effective, innovative and inclusive. Our university also aims to bring academia and sector stakeholders together by attaching importance to its mission of cooperation with the real sector.

The workshop was attended by Assoc. Abdurrahman Çetin from Deputy Secretary General of the Association of Financial Institutions, İlhan Soylu from Chairman of the Board of Directors of İmece Tasarruf Finansman A.Ş., Furkan Akbal, Board Member of Fuzul Tasarruf Finansman A.Ş., Mustafa Mutlu Çalışkan, General Manager of Eminevim Tasarruf Finansman A.Ş., General Manager of Fuzul Tasarruf Finansman A.Ş. Sait Aytaç, General Manager of Katılımevim Tasarruf Finansman A.Ş. Ahmet Özcan, General Manager of Sinpaş Tasarruf Finansman A.Ş. Merve Onarlı and Deputy General Manager of Birevim Tasarruf Finansman A.Ş. Kenan Sevinç.
